summary: Phase 1 Stripe Connect wallet API testing completed. All 13 backend tests pass. Wallet endpoints (GET /api/wallet, GET /api/wallet/transactions) work correctly with proper auth, idempotent wallet creation, and correct field types.

minor.issue: Requires trailing slash (/api/wallet/) - without trailing slash returns empty response. This is a FastAPI routing behavior that should be noted.

backend: GET /api/wallet returns all required fields (wallet_id, available_balance, pending_balance, total_balance, currency, stripe_connect_status, can_payout, minimum_payout)
can_payout=false when balance < 500 or stripe_connect_status != active
Wallet is idempotent - same wallet_id returned across multiple calls
GET /api/wallet/transactions returns correct structure (transactions array, total, limit, skip)
Transactions endpoint respects pagination params (limit, skip)

verified_wallet_fields.can_payout: boolean (false when balance < 500 or status != active)

seed_data_creation: None - wallet auto-created via ensure_wallet on first GET /api/wallet call
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 Stripe Connect wallet API implemented. (1) GET /api/wallet/ returns wallet with balance fields in centimes, (2) GET /api/wallet/transactions returns ledger history with pagination, (3) Wallet auto-created via ensure_wallet() which is idempotent, (4) can_payout requires available_balance >= 500 AND stripe_connect_status == 'active', (5) Note: endpoints require trailing slash (/api/wallet/ not /api/wallet). All tests pass.
